title: RebindAllTheKeys
description: Adds keybinds to keys that aren't rebindable
body:
![Fabric Loader Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-informational "Fabric Loader Badge") ![Fabric API Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Needs%20Fabric%20API-Yes-success "Fabric API Badge") ![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.16.2+-success "Minecraft Version") Tries to add keybinds for keys that you can't bind in vanilla.
**Control Options Added:** - Double Tap Sprint *- Default ON* - Double Tap Fly *- Default ON* - Sprint, Sneak, and Fly toggle/hold now has a 3rd option, persistent. When persistent, it's active until you stop moving - For macOS: Cmd → Ctrl *- Default OFF* **Keybinds Added:** - Flying *- Default Not Bound* - Dismount (Default Left Shift) - Debug Key *- Default F3* - Toggle Hud *- Default F1* - Toggle Narrator (Override) *- Default Not Bound (When not bound, it uses the normal Ctrl + B)* - Inventory Quick Move *- Default Shift* - Drop Stack Modifier *- Default Ctrl* - Hotbar Next *- Default Scroll Down* - Hotbar Previous *- Default Scroll Up* - Server List Refresh *- Default F5* - Quit / Close Menu Alias *- Default Not Bound (ESC will always work)* - Screen Primary (Default Left Click) - Screen Secondary (Default Right Click) **The following is used by the Debug Key + Below, and therefore won't conflict with any keys not in this sublist** - Reload Chunks *- Default A* - Show Hitboxes *- Default B* - Copy Location *- Default C* - Clear Chat *- Default D* - Cycle Render Distance *- Default F* - Show Chunk Boundaries *- Default G* - Advance Tooltips *- Default H* - Copy Block/Entity Data *- Default I* - Start/Stop Profiler *- Default L* - Swap Previous Gamemode <-> Spectator *- Default N* - Pause on Lost Focus *- Default P* - Show Debug Keybinds *- Default Q* - Reload Resources *- Default T* - Gamemode Switcher *- Default F4* - Intentional Crash (when key is held) *- Default C* - Dump Dynamic Textures *- Default S (1.20.2+)* - Profiler Graph *- Default 1(1.20.2+) Shift(older)* - FPS & TPS Graph *- Default 2(1.20.2+) Alt(older)* - Packet Size & Ping Graph *- Default 3(1.20.2+)*
Version 1.4.0 **Control Options Added:** - Double Tap Sprint *- Default ON* - For macOS: Cmd → Ctrl *- Default OFF* **Keybinds Added:** - Debug Key *- Default F3* - Toggle Hud *- Default F1* - Toggle Narrator (Override) *- Default Not Bound (When not bound, it uses the normal Ctrl + B)* - Inventory Quick Move *- Default Shift* - Drop Stack Modifier *- Default Ctrl* - Hotbar Next (Override) *- Default Not Bound (When not bound, it uses the normal scroll down)* - Hotbar Previous (Override) *- Default Not Bound (When not bound, it uses the normal scroll up)* - Server List Refresh *- Default F5* - Quit / Close Menu Alias *- Default Not Bound (ESC will always work)* **The following is used by the Debug Key + Below, and therefore won't conflict with any keys not in this sublist** - Reload Chunks *- Default A* - Show Hitboxes *- Default B* - Copy Location *- Default C* - Clear Chat *- Default D* - Cycle Render Distance *- Default F* - Show Chunk Boundaries *- Default G* - Advance Tooltips *- Default H* - Copy Block/Entity Data *- Default I* - Start/Stop Profiler *- Default L* - Swap Previous Gamemode <-> Spectator *- Default N* - Pause on Lost Focus *- Default P* - Show Debug Keybinds *- Default Q* - Reload Resources *- Default T* - Gamemode Switcher *- Default F4* - Intentional Crash (when key is held) *- Default C* - Dump Dynamic Textures *- Default S (1.20.2+)* - Profiler Graph *- Default 1(1.20.2+) Shift(older)* - FPS & TPS Graph *- Default 2(1.20.2+) Alt(older)* - Packet Size & Ping Graph *- Default 3(1.20.2+)* **Amecs Warning:** While the mods are mostly compatible with each other, unfortunately RebindAllTheKeys will ignore any modifiers added to the keybind from Amecs.
